title: DecisionRecord
description: A scoped authority record required before an AI-controlled action may become consequence.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision record.

actor.description: The system, agent, service, or human requesting the transition.

authority_source.description: The policy, human authority, role, or signed source granting permission.

target.description: The exact mutation, action, system, or consequence surface being authorised.

scope.description: The permitted boundary of the transition.

expires_at.description: When the record stops being valid.

signature.description: Cryptographic or equivalent binding proof over the decision record.
